jokes.text: Someone forgot to feed Max!
jokes.setup: Conan asks his band leader to play him over
jokes.punchline: The band leader is apparently dead from not being fed
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy about future show business logistics, delivered matter-of-factly

jokes.text: So, people are getting pretty worried about this Y2K problem, huh?
jokes.setup: Conan doing topical comedy in the year 3000
jokes.punchline: Y2K is ancient history but he's still doing the material
jokes.explanation: Meta joke about comedy aging poorly, relevant to the show's premise

jokes.text: No! They fixed that 900 years ago!
jokes.punchline: Audience member corrects him with specific timeline
jokes.explanation: Good heckle that reinforces the future setting

jokes.text: I doubt it!
jokes.setup: Conan claims he was walking to work
jokes.punchline: Audience member doubts a disembodied head can walk
jokes.explanation: Visual comedy callback to Conan being just a head

jokes.text: Listen, I may have lost my freakishly long legs in the War of 2012... but I've still got something you'll never have: a soul! And freckles!
jokes.punchline: Escalates from profound (soul) to mundane (freckles)
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation structure and character-specific comedy about Conan's features

jokes.text: Let's face it. Comedy's a dead art form. Now, tragedy? That's funny.
jokes.punchline: Finds tragedy funnier than comedy
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender line - cynical, philosophical, and quotable with great economy

jokes.text: I'm glad global warming never happened. Actually, it did. Thank God, Nuclear Winter canceled it out.
jokes.setup: Professor expressing relief about global warming
jokes.punchline: Reveals it happened but nuclear war fixed it
jokes.explanation: Brilliant misdirection with perfect Professor delivery, dark environmental commentary

jokes.text: At least you're not cold-blooded.
jokes.setup: Everyone complaining about being stuck in snow
jokes.punchline: Fry trying to comfort the literally cold-blooded Zoidberg
jokes.explanation: Typical Fry obliviousness to obvious biological facts

jokes.text: Sweet lion of Zion, look at the professor go!
jokes.punchline: Hermes' characteristic exclamation watching the visual
jokes.explanation: Classic Hermes exclamation, character-specific but not especially clever

jokes.text: Trees down! Trees doWn! Cool. What if you want the trees up? Trees up! Trees down. Trees doWn.
jokes.setup: Bender using voice command to lower trees
jokes.punchline: Fry fascinated by the simple technology
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Fry's wonder at future tech

jokes.text: Lick my frozen metal ass.
jokes.punchline: Bender's characteristically rude response
jokes.explanation: Pure Bender - rude, robot-specific insult, perfectly in character

jokes.text: They came in last at the Olympics and retired to promote alcoholic drinks.
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg deflates the inspiration with realistic outcome
jokes.explanation: Good subversion of inspirational sports story trope

jokes.text: Like when you say 'ask' instead of 'ax.'
jokes.punchline: References modern pronunciation debate as future resolved issue
jokes.explanation: Smart commentary on language evolution and dialect prejudice

jokes.text: Pine trees have been extinct for 800 years, Fry. Gone the way of the poodle and your primitive notions of modesty.
jokes.punchline: Professor lists extinct things, escalating to Fry's modesty
jokes.explanation: Great escalation from environmental to personal, very Professor-like

jokes.text: Ah! Brisk.
jokes.punchline: Massive understatement of his discomfort
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective understatement, economical delivery

jokes.text: Dad would whip up his special eggnog out of bourbon and ice cubes.
jokes.setup: Fry reminiscing about family Christmas traditions
jokes.punchline: Dad's 'special' eggnog is just straight bourbon
jokes.explanation: Good family dysfunction humor that fits Fry's background

jokes.text: Happy Xmas, Xmas people! Xmas cards have arrived! Xmas!
jokes.punchline: Mail guy bursts in with maximum Xmas enthusiasm
jokes.explanation: Good comedic timing, interrupting the mood with opposite energy

jokes.text: Yes, I got the most! I win Xmas!
jokes.punchline: Treats card quantity as a competition to win
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender - competitive about everything, even kindness

jokes.text: Instead of Claus, he writes 'Claws.' Now that's humorous. Today's comedians could learn from this card.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg reading Xmas card from cousin
jokes.punchline: Thinks crab-related pun is superior to modern comedy
jokes.explanation: Good meta humor and callback, perfect Zoidberg appreciation for bad puns

jokes.text: I'm the loneliest person on Earth.
jokes.setup: Fry complaining about missing people from 1000 years ago
jokes.punchline: Claims ultimate loneliness while surrounded by friends
jokes.explanation: Sets up the comparison with Leela's actual loneliness

jokes.text: She's an orphan. Yes. And the only one of her species in all the known universe.
jokes.punchline: Escalating from orphan to literally unique in universe
jokes.explanation: Good escalation structure that puts Fry's complaints in perspective

jokes.text: I feel like a rat. I've been whining like a pig while Leela was lonely as a frog.
jokes.punchline: Uses animal metaphors for no apparent reason
jokes.explanation: Typical Fry odd phrasing, animal metaphors don't quite work but that's the joke

jokes.text: You'd have to be blind not to notice that Leela's a Cyclops.
jokes.punchline: Uses 'blind' metaphor about one-eyed person
jokes.explanation: Solid wordplay with ironic use of vision metaphor

jokes.text: Fry's over there, man.
jokes.setup: Bender apparently giving his speech to wrong person
jokes.punchline: Hermes redirects him to actual Fry location
jokes.explanation: Simple visual gag about Bender's misdirected lecture

jokes.text: Homeless robots, too poor to afford even the basic alcohol they need to fuel their circuits. Is there anything sadder? Only drowning puppies. And there would have to be a lot of them.
jokes.punchline: Escalates to drowning puppies with casual calculation
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark comedy escalation with perfect Morbo delivery and alien logic

jokes.text: Right. As if you ever did anything charitable. I'm very generous. What about that time I gave blood? Whose blood? Some guy's.
jokes.punchline: Bender's 'donation' was actually theft
jokes.explanation: Perfect misdirection with excellent character work - Bender's twisted logic

jokes.text: I know about Santa Claus. Back in 2801, the Friendly Robot Company built a robotic Santa...
jokes.punchline: Sets up the twisted robot Santa premise
jokes.explanation: Excellent premise setup that subverts Christmas mythology

jokes.text: I'm one of those lazy homeless bums I've been hearing about. Can you point me to the free booze?
jokes.punchline: Immediately adopts homeless persona for free alcohol
jokes.explanation: Good Fry moment showing his opportunistic nature and social obliviousness

jokes.text: There's a suicide booth in the Food Court. Though there's a line this time of year.
jokes.setup: Fry asking for help with his romantic problems
jokes.punchline: Robot casually suggests suicide, notes holiday rush
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy with great deadpan delivery and callback to series mythology

jokes.text: A surface-to-Santa rocket launcher. Comes with 3 jolly-seeking missiles.
jokes.punchline: Military weapon with Christmas-themed targeting
jokes.explanation: Excellent wordplay combining military tech with Christmas terminology

jokes.text: Best is a matter of opinion. I personally like the electric snail. That's a stupid animal. You're stupid. I said I want the best one.
jokes.setup: Fry asking for the best pet
jokes.punchline: Immediately insults vendor's suggestion and vendor himself
jokes.explanation: Good cringe comedy showing Fry's social incompetence under pressure

jokes.text: The parrot is $500. That's a hell of a good parrot. Although, I could get 500 lizards for the same price. Girls like swarms of lizards, right?
jokes.punchline: Considers swarm of lizards as romantic gift
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist logic and character work showing Fry's romantic cluelessness

jokes.text: Shut the hell up!
jokes.setup: Fry commenting on parrot being talkative
jokes.punchline: Parrot rudely responds to compliment
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection with economical delivery, sets up parrot's personality

jokes.text: I ax him to set the table. And he goes out to buy you a present. Selfish dog.
jokes.punchline: Calls Fry selfish for doing something thoughtful, plus 'ax' callback
jokes.explanation: Good irony and subtle callback to earlier pronunciation joke

jokes.text: You saved my life. I am going to get you so many lizards.
jokes.setup: Fry grateful to Leela for rescue
jokes.punchline: Promises lizards as reward, callback to earlier pet shop scene
jokes.explanation: Solid callback showing Fry still doesn't understand appropriate gifts

jokes.text: Well, check it twice. I perform over 50 mega-checks per second.
jokes.setup: Fry challenging Santa to check his list twice
jokes.punchline: Robot Santa's literal interpretation with tech specs
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback to Christmas song with robot logic twist

jokes.text: Did either of you ever stop to think about Doctor Zoidberg's feelings?
jokes.setup: Santa explaining why Fry and Leela are naughty
jokes.punchline: Points out their neglect of Zoidberg
jokes.explanation: Good character work highlighting the show's running gag about ignoring Zoidberg

jokes.text: What about the traditional glass of hard cider? Oh, all right. But just one glass.
jokes.punchline: Fry offers drink as if Santa is traditional visitor
jokes.explanation: Good subversion of Christmas traditions and character consistency

jokes.text: I'll shove coal so far up your stocking, you'll cough up diamonds!
jokes.punchline: Christmas threat with geological transformation
jokes.explanation: Excellent violent Christmas imagery with clever coal-to-diamonds logic

jokes.text: I never thought it'd end this way, gunned down by Santa Claus. Honestly, I didn't see it coming.
jokes.punchline: Admits she didn't anticipate this specific death scenario
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan delivery of absurd situation with good understatement

jokes.text: Your mistletoe is no match for my T.O.W. missile.
jokes.punchline: Santa contrasts romantic tradition with military hardware
jokes.explanation: Brilliant juxtaposition of Christmas romance with military violence, extremely quotable

jokes.text: On the fourth day of Xmas I stole from that lady: Four family photos, Three jars of pennies, Two former husbands, And a slipper on a shoe tree
jokes.punchline: Santa's version involves theft with escalating absurdity
jokes.explanation: Good Christmas song parody with escalating absurdity and criminal twist

jokes.text: You've been very naughty, Bender! I didn't do nothing. You're thinking of the kid.
jokes.punchline: Bender immediately tries to frame Tinny Tim
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender character moment - cowardly and willing to sacrifice others

jokes.text: My God, Bender. Framing an orphan? That's so naughty I'll have to add it to my list right now.
jokes.setup: Bender tries to frame Tinny Tim
jokes.punchline: Even killer Santa is shocked by how low Bender will go
jokes.explanation: Great character moment - Bender is so awful even the villain is impressed

jokes.text: But I sold my hair to a wigmaker to buy a set of combs for Hermes. Oh, the irony. I sold my hair so I could buy this third set of combs for Zoidberg.
jokes.setup: Gift of the Magi parody setup
jokes.punchline: Professor escalates the irony with excessive comb purchasing
jokes.explanation: Good parody of classic O. Henry story with escalation twist

jokes.text: A set of combs for your beautiful hair. / Oh, that's so sweet. / But I sold my hair to a wigmaker to buy a set of combs for Hermes.
jokes.punchline: O. Henry 'Gift of the Magi' situation
jokes.explanation: Classic O. Henry reference executed competently but predictably

jokes.text: Finally I look as pretty as I feel.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg wearing wig from hair purchases
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg's self-image versus reality
jokes.explanation: Classic Zoidberg delusion with economical delivery

jokes.text: Sweet manatee of Galilee! He's on the roof!
jokes.punchline: Hermes' characteristic religious exclamation with marine mammal
jokes.explanation: Perfect Hermes exclamation with religious/animal wordplay

jokes.text: Except you, Doctor Zoidberg. This is for you. A pogo stick.
jokes.setup: Santa giving presents to naughty people
jokes.punchline: Only Zoidberg gets a real gift, and it's random
jokes.explanation: Good character payoff and callback to earlier Santa criticism

jokes.text: Come on, everybody. If you don't believe in him, he can't hurt you. Oh, God, the pain!
jokes.setup: Leela applies Peter Pan logic to killer Santa
jokes.punchline: Immediately proven wrong as Santa attacks her
jokes.explanation: Perfect immediate reversal - childish logic meets violent reality instantly

jokes.text: Oh, God, the pain!
jokes.setup: Fry claims not believing in Santa will protect him
jokes.punchline: Immediately gets hurt, disproving his theory
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy callback disproving Fry's logic

jokes.text: Watch out, his belly's shaking like a bowl full of nitroglycerine.
jokes.punchline: Christmas poem reference with explosive twist
jokes.explanation: Excellent Christmas poem callback with violent twist

jokes.text: You got the toenail.
jokes.punchline: Reveals disgusting nature of the 'bird' they're eating
jokes.explanation: Gross-out humor callback to Bender's questionable cooking

jokes.text: And even though I'm surrounded by robots and monsters and old people... I've never felt more at home.
jokes.setup: Fry reflecting on his new life
jokes.punchline: Describes friends as monsters but feels at home
jokes.explanation: Sweet character moment with gentle comedy about his new family

jokes.text: He knows when you are sleeping, He knows when you're on the can, He'll hunt you down and blast your ass from here to Pakistan
jokes.punchline: Traditional song twisted into violent threat
jokes.explanation: Excellent Christmas carol parody with perfect violent twist

jokes.text: Next Xmas!
jokes.punchline: Makes it Christmas-specific threat
jokes.explanation: Good action movie parody with Christmas twist, sets up future episodes
